RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RICHELLE NAVAL's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS PENINSULA YELLOW CAB COMPANY, LLC AND RAKESH KUMAR & YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The First Amended Complaint filed on June 12, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. REID M. MILLER OF KNOX RICKSEN, LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 285-2500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANDREW S. GILL OF GILBERT, KELLY CROWLEY & JENNETT LLP, TEL. NO. 352-6406 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
ATTY. HUNTER W. SIMS OF THE STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, TEL. NO. (510) 457-3468 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT NAVAL.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PENINSULA YELLOW CAB COMPANY, LLC AND RAKESH KUMAR'S Motion To Transfer Venue to San Mateo County is Denied. Defendants have failed produce evidence tending to show that a transfer of venue would serve either the convenience of witness or the ends of justice. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/AJR)

Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Continued To Mar-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

DEFENDANTs PENINSULA YELLOW CAB COMPANY, LLC and RAKESH KUMAR's Motion To Transfer Venue is continued to March 4, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Marla J.
